bear.t: Reliance On Capital Raises & Equity Volatility
bear.b: The balance sheet shows past negative equity and steady reliance on equity financings to fund R&D. Recent underwritten offerings and dilution (insider participation noted) underscore dependence on capital markets. Structurally, this raises the probability of further dilution and ties program continuity to market access
